title: City of Syracuse Launches Lead Water Educational Materials
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water launched public educational materials on lead water safety in coordination with EPA and NYSDOH. Materials address health risks of lead exposure and mitigation steps, available online, in-person at City Hall and libraries, and by phone. The City is treating water with orthophosphate and actively replacing lead service lines ahead of EPA deadlines.

entity_refs.name: New York State Department of Health

political_signal.description: Executive demonstrates alignment with federal/state public health mandates and proactive infrastructure remediation; positions City as responsive to health equity and environmental compliance.
